demoScript.demoText: Click the Ask Cal button to open the assistant.
Suggested prompts help users quickly ask about bookings, availability, or event types with a single click.
The ThinkingIndicator displays a pulsing 'Thinking…' label while the assistant is generating a response, providing subtle visual feedback during processing.
Hover over a message to reveal thumbs up, thumbs down, and copy actions. Click to give feedback or copy the message content.
